testcase.name: launchApplication

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created from disconnected: unable to connect to renderer Host info: host: 'Smarts-MacBook-Pro.local', ip: '2401:4900:3bdc:7cd3:4c1:e681:8e27:2833%en0' Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '15.1.1', java.version: '24.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [headless], binary: /Applications/Google Chrome..., extensions: []}}]}]

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500.
